contexts.name: test
contexts.notes: Includes mix test (11 docs-contract lanes), format, hex.build, compile --warnings-as-errors, docs, credo, dialyzer. Viewer-evidence schema/lint folded here per Phase 68 D-18 — not a separate required context. Public-api contract lane added Phase 79 D-07.

advisory_contexts.name: viewer-evidence-live-proof
advisory_contexts.notes: Phase 71 structural-proxy evidence regen; not required on main per D-18/D-32.

advisory_contexts.name: example-phoenix
advisory_contexts.notes: Phase 76 reference Phoenix app smoke; not required on main per REF-03/D-09.

advisory_contexts.name: raster-advisory
advisory_contexts.notes: Phase 85 deterministic raster snapshots and Phase 86 launch artifact PNG/hash checks; not required on main. Pdfium download or check failures must never block engine merges.

advisory_contexts.name: comparison-advisory
advisory_contexts.notes: Phase 87 comparison evidence static check; not required on main and must not rerun external benchmarks.

advisory_contexts.name: livebook-advisory
advisory_contexts.notes: Phase 87 Livebook tutorial static execution check; not required on main and must not start a Livebook server.

supersedes_planning_refs.rationale: Structural viewer-evidence enforcement folds into test job; no fourth required GitHub context.
